name: Journey Junction
desc: Full-stack travel platform for discovering destinations, planning trips, bookings, payments, and admin tourism management.
overview: Journey Junction is a complete travel experience platform where users can explore destinations across India, plan trips, manage bookings, make Stripe payments, and track their travel activity through a polished dashboard.
features: Dynamic destination discovery and detail pages
Trip planning with hotels, transport, meals, activities, and pickup options
Secure authentication with role-based admin access
Stripe Checkout integration for paid bookings
Admin panel for destinations, bookings, reviews, inquiries, and users
Traveler dashboard with bookings, payment status, wishlist, and reviews

name: Fancy Garments
desc: Full-stack MERN e-commerce platform with secure payments, AI chatbot, and admin dashboard.
overview: Built to give local garment stores an online presence. Handles the full shopping journey from product discovery to payment and order tracking.

name: Travel Website
desc: Responsive travel booking platform with destination search, cart checkout, and admin panel.
overview: A complete travel booking system where users can search destinations, add to cart, and manage bookings. Admins manage listings in real time.

name: EduDiscover
desc: Full-stack college discovery platform for India.
overview: A comprehensive platform where students can browse, filter, compare, and save Indian colleges. It is powered by a rich PostgreSQL dataset featuring top Indian institutions, complete with student reviews and Q&A.
features: Browse, filter, and compare top Indian colleges
Save favorite colleges and custom comparisons
Student reviews and interactive Q&A section

name: Certificate-Generator
desc: Full-stack certificate generation and management app for creating PDF and PNG certificates.
overview: A complete certificate generation system where admins can generate certificates, search and paginate through records, and download them in PDF or PNG formats. Built with a Node.js backend and a React frontend.
features: Certificate generation with PDF and PNG formats
Dockerized deployment for frontend and backend

name: Online Book Store
desc: PHP + MySQL bookstore with buy/sell functionality and Bootstrap-based responsive layout.
overview: A simple but functional web app for buying and selling books online. Uses PHP procedural functions and MySQL for data persistence.

name: Learning Management System
desc: Web-based LMS connecting learners and educators through a collaborative HTML/CSS/JS platform.
overview: A cooperative learning platform built to bridge students and teachers. Focused on simplicity and accessibility for first-time users.

name: AI Safety Incident Dashboard
desc: Interactive frontend dashboard for tracking AI safety incidents — built for HumanChain's mission.
overview: Demonstrates core frontend skills: dynamic state management, filtering, sorting, and clean UI. Built as a take-home project aligned with AI safety tooling.

name: Furniture Store
desc: Online furniture store with customizable products, 3D room planner, and seamless checkout.
overview: A premium furniture shopping experience built with Laravel. Features a 3D room planner to help customers visualize pieces in their space before buying.

name: VTECHSOFT-Digital-Agency
desc: Premium IT services platform specializing in web engineering, mobile architecture, cloud DevOps, and robust APIs.
overview: A modern, highly-interactive digital agency platform designed to showcase enterprise IT services. It features a premium dark-themed UI with fluid scroll animations, detailed service capability breakdowns, case studies, contact workflows, and a dedicated admin panel for content management.
features: Interactive landing page with dynamic scroll-reveal animations
Comprehensive service capabilities and tech stack showcases
Client consultation contact workflow and forms
Admin panel for managing inquiries and content
Responsive, premium dark-themed glassmorphism UI design

name: Fitness Management System
desc: Console-based C program managing client records, workout schedules, and memberships.
overview: A low-level systems project written in C to manage gym clients and schedules. Demonstrates strong fundamentals in data structures, file I/O, and procedural programming.
